creator: marcs@znep.com
text:
Once in a while, when you go to enter your password in sudo it will
time out right away and print the password prompt then put you back
in your shell; you don't get a chance to enter it.

This happened very occasionally on 2.1-stable, but seems to happen 
a lot on 2.2 especially using screen.

Fix: Apply the following patch.  sudo was using the results of 
sysconf(_SC_OPEN_MAX) to set the nfds for select().  That's broken,
especially with the changes in 2.2.
